title: Review Phase 1: CLI Flags & Error Handling
description: Fix 15 CLI flag and error handling issues from the romanesco review. 24 tasks following TDD rhythm. Design: docs/reviews/implementation-plan.md, Plan: docs/plans/2026-02-17-review-phase1-cli-implementation.md

title: 12: Add help text mentioning TUI mode
description: Add 'Run without arguments for interactive mode' to rootCmd.Long. Files: main.go

title: 4: Write test for version command dev builds
description: Test version prints (dev build) when empty. Files: main_test.go, main.go

title: 7: Update main() to skip printing SilentErrors
description: Check error type in main(), skip PrintError for SilentError. Files: main.go, main_test.go

title: Write update_test.go (~18 tests)
description: Update workflow: menu (nav/see-new/update-now/check), preview (scroll/enter/esc), pull (keys ignored), done (esc), messages (check/preview/pull success+error), auto-update, utilities (versionNewer/parseVersion)

title: 10: Add warning when findProjectRoot falls back to CWD
description: Add stderr warning in findProjectRootImpl. Files: helpers.go, helpers_test.go

title: Extract shared gitUsername() utility
description: Three copies of gitUsername() exist: tui/import.go, cmd/nesco/add.go, and main.go (backfill). Create internal/gitutil/gitutil.go with a single Username() function. Update cmd/nesco callers (add.go, main.go). TUI copy can stay to avoid import cycle, or can also use it since internal/gitutil has no TUI dependency.

title: 16: Fix info providers using slugs vs display names
description: Use ContentType.Label() consistently in info providers. Files: info.go

title: Log errors from metadata.Save in import paths
description: doImport(), doBatchImport(), add.go, and doScaffold() all call metadata.Save/SaveProvider without checking errors. If metadata save fails, user gets success message with silently missing metadata. Fix: log error to stderr (non-fatal but visible).
close_reason: Fixed by subagents in parallel execution

title: Write import_test.go (~35 tests)
description: Import workflow: source selection (nav/select/esc), type selection (nav/universal/provider-specific/create/esc), provider selection (nav/select/esc), browse start, path input, git URL, clone done, git pick, name input, validate, confirm, import done

title: Fix DetectContent map iteration nondeterminism
description: detect.go:32 — markerFiles is a map[string]string but comment says 'priority order'. Map iteration in Go is nondeterministic. If a dir has both SKILL.md and AGENT.md, result is random. Fix: replace map with ordered slice of struct{marker, label}.
close_reason: Fixed by subagents in parallel execution

title: Remove dead runBackfill() standalone function
description: main.go:260-302 — runBackfill() is never called. It duplicates the backfillCmd cobra handler (lines 57-103). Delete the entire function.
close_reason: Fixed by subagents in parallel execution

title: Write integration_test.go (~8 teatest tests)
description: Teatest integration: category→items, search flow, detail tabs, settings toggle, import start, quit, ctrl+c anywhere, window resize

title: 2A: Add Quiet global and update Print()
description: Add output.Quiet bool, suppress Print() when set. Files: output.go, output_test.go

title: 15A: Add basic slug validation warning
description: Warn for unknown provider slugs in config add. Files: config_cmd.go

title: 15B: Enhance slug warning to list known providers
description: Add provider list to unknown slug warning. Files: config_cmd.go

title: Group 5: Phase 2 CLI Commands
description: Drift/baseline infrastructure, scan/drift/baseline commands. Depends on Groups 3+4.
close_reason: All 4 tasks complete — Phase 2 CLI commands implemented

title: 5.1: Create drift/baseline package
description: Create cli/internal/drift/ package. Baseline struct with section hashes. SaveBaseline()/LoadBaseline()/BaselineExists()/BaselineFromDocument(). Diff() compares two baselines, reports changed/new/removed. DriftReport with Clean bool. TDD: baseline_test.go and diff_test.go with roundtrip and change detection tests.
close_reason: All Group 5 tasks complete — drift package + scan/drift/baseline commands

title: 5.2: Add nesco scan command
description: scan.go: runs all detectors, emits to configured providers, updates baseline. Flags: --format, --all, --dry-run, --full (parity), --json, --yes. Exit code 2 if no detectable project. TDD: scan_test.go with JSON output, dry-run no-write, and baseline creation tests.
close_reason: All Group 5 tasks complete — drift package + scan/drift/baseline commands

title: 5.3: Add nesco drift command
description: drift.go: compares current scan against baseline. Flags: --ci (exit code 3 on drift), --json. Error if no baseline exists. TDD: drift_test.go with no-baseline error, clean state, and JSON output tests.
close_reason: All Group 5 tasks complete — drift package + scan/drift/baseline commands

title: 5.4: Add nesco baseline command
description: baseline.go: runs detectors and saves baseline WITHOUT emitting context files. Flags: --from-import, --json. TDD: baseline_test.go with baseline creation, no-emit verification, and JSON output tests.
close_reason: All Group 5 tasks complete — drift package + scan/drift/baseline commands

title: 2B: Wire --quiet flag in main.go
description: Wire --quiet to output.Quiet in PersistentPreRunE. Files: main.go, main_test.go

title: Fix startPull() value receiver discarding state
description: update.go:286-288 — startPull() has value receiver (m updateModel). Setting m.step = stepUpdatePull modifies a local copy. Callers return unmodified m. Fix: set m.step before calling startPull() at each call site, or change startPull to return the modified model.
close_reason: Fixed by subagents in parallel execution

title: Handle readme.EnsureReadme error in doBatchImport
description: import.go line ~924 — readme.EnsureReadme in doBatchImport discards both return values. The bool is intentionally ignored (no hint in batch), but the error should be logged to stderr.

title: Group 4: Surprise Detectors
description: 24 surprise detectors (cross-language, Go, Python, Rust, JS/TS) + registry. Depends on Group 3.
close_reason: All 7 tasks complete — 24 surprise detectors + registry + integration test

title: 4.1: Cross-language detectors 1-4
description: Competing Frameworks (#1): detects React+Vue, Express+Fastify, etc. Module System Conflict (#2): detects CJS/ESM mixing. Migration In Progress (#3): detects coexisting old/new patterns. Wrapper Bypass (#4): detects direct DB calls bypassing ORM. TDD: tests per detector with fixture projects.

title: 4.2: Cross-language detectors 5-8
description: Lock File Conflict (#5): multiple lockfiles. Test Convention Mismatch (#6): mixed test locations. Deprecated Pattern Usage (#7): outdated APIs. Path Alias Gap (#8): tsconfig paths not in bundler. TDD: tests per detector with positive/negative fixture cases.

title: 4.3: Cross-language detectors 9-12
description: Version Mismatch (#9): peer dep mismatches. Version Constraint (#10): language version requirements. Env Convention (#11): undocumented env vars. Linter Config Extraction (#12): extracts rules from .prettierrc/.editorconfig. TDD: tests per detector.

title: 4.4: Go-specific detectors 13-16
description: Internal Package Visibility (#13): traces internal/ imports. Nil Interface Comparison (#14): typed nil returns through interfaces. CGO Detection (#15): import C and build environment. Replace Directives (#16): local-path go.mod replaces. TDD: tests per detector with Go project fixtures.
close_reason: All detectors implemented and tests passing

title: 4.5: Python-specific detectors 17-19
description: Async/Sync Mismatch (#17): sync blocking calls in async handlers. Package Layout (#18): src/ vs flat layout detection. Namespace Package Confusion (#19): missing __init__.py. TDD: tests per detector with Python project fixtures.
close_reason: All detectors implemented and tests passing

title: 4.6: Rust detectors 20-22 and JS/TS detectors 23-24
description: Feature Flag Mapping (#20): Cargo.toml features + cfg usage. Unsafe Code Policy (#21): forbid/deny unsafe. Async Runtime (#22): tokio/async-std detection. TS Strictness (#23): tsconfig strict flags. Monorepo (#24): workspace detection. TDD: tests per detector.
close_reason: All detectors implemented and tests passing

title: 4.7: Register all detectors and integration test
description: registry.go: AllDetectors() returns all 29 detectors (5 fact + 24 surprise). SurpriseDetectors() returns only 24. Integration test: full scanner against empty dir and multi-language fixture. TDD: registry_test.go and integration_test.go.
close_reason: Registry with 29 detectors + integration test passing

title: Fix Uninstall() failing on copy-installed directories
description: installer.go:165 — Uninstall checks for symlinks or regular files but not directories. Copy-installed skills (e.g., via Windows mount fallback) produce real directories. os.Remove() fails on non-empty dirs. Fix: add info.IsDir() check that calls os.RemoveAll().
close_reason: Fixed by subagents in parallel execution

title: Group 3: Scan Infrastructure
description: Scanner orchestrator, 5 fact detectors, emitters (Claude/Cursor/generic), boundary reconciler. Depends on Group 1.

title: 3.1: Create scanner orchestrator
description: Create cli/internal/scan/ package. Detector interface: Name()/Detect(root string)([]Section, error). Scanner struct: NewScanner(detectors...), Run(root)(ScanResult). Parallel goroutine execution with 5s timeout per detector. ScanResult with Document, Warnings, Duration. TDD: scanner_test.go with timeout, panic recovery, and warning tests.

title: 3.2: Create TechStack and Dependencies detectors
description: TechStack detector: parses go.mod, package.json, Cargo.toml, pyproject.toml. Returns TechStackSection. Dependencies detector: parses lockfiles, groups by category. Returns DependencySection. TDD: techstack_test.go and deps_test.go with multi-language fixture tests.

title: 3.3: Create BuildCommands, DirectoryStructure, ProjectMetadata detectors
description: BuildCommands: parses Makefile/package.json scripts/Taskfile. DirectoryStructure: tree walk respecting .gitignore. ProjectMetadata: extracts from README/LICENSE/CI configs. TDD: tests for each with fixture directories.

title: 3.4: Create Claude Code emitter
description: Create cli/internal/emit/ package. Emitter interface: Name()/Format()/Emit(ContextDocument)(string, error). Claude emitter produces CLAUDE.md with boundary markers, section ordering, 32KB limit handling. TDD: claude_emitter_test.go with section ordering and boundary marker tests.

title: 3.5: Create Cursor and generic emitters
description: Cursor emitter: produces .mdc files with YAML frontmatter, one per section category. Generic emitter: plain markdown for AGENTS.md/GEMINI.md/copilot. EmitterForProvider() factory. TDD: cursor_emitter_test.go and generic_emitter_test.go.

title: 3.6: Create boundary marker parser and reconciler
description: Create cli/internal/reconcile/ package. ParseBoundaries() finds nesco:auto and nesco:human markers. ReconcileAndWrite() merges new auto content with preserved human sections. Standalone step between emitter and filesystem. TDD: reconcile_test.go with preserve, append, and conflict tests.

title: Add teatest dependency and create testhelpers_test.go
description: Setup: add go dependency, create shared fixtures (testCatalog, testProviders, testDetectors, testApp, key constants, assertion helpers)
close_reason: testhelpers_test.go created with all fixtures: init(), testCatalog(), testProviders(), testDetectors(), testApp(), key constants, pressN(), assertScreen/Contains/NotContains. Compiles and all existing tests pass.

title: Write category_test.go (~13 tests)
description: Category screen: navigation, select each type, MyTools, Import, Update, Settings, message clear, update banner, counts, quit, version, help

title: 1A: Write test for --no-color flag
description: Table-driven test for --no-color, NO_COLOR env, TERM=dumb. Files: main_test.go
close_reason: Test written and passing. 3 subtests covering flag, NO_COLOR, TERM=dumb.

title: Rename findRepoRoot/findProjectRoot for clarity
description: cmd/nesco/ has findRepoRoot() (finds romanesco content repo, looks for skills/) and findProjectRoot() (finds user project, looks for .git/go.mod). Names are confusingly similar. Rename findRepoRoot to findContentRepoRoot. Update all call sites.

title: Task One
description: - type: task

title: 17: Add provider-to-format mapping in info formats
description: Append provider list to each format in plain text output. Files: info.go

title: Group 1: Foundation
description: Cobra CLI, ContextDocument model, Provider expansion, .nesco/ config, output switching. All subsequent groups depend on this.

title: 1.1: Add Cobra dependency and restructure CLI entrypoint
description: Add cobra dependency. Create cli/cmd/nesco/main.go with rootCmd. Add version, scan, drift, baseline subcommands (stubs). Wire global flags (--json, --no-color, --quiet, --verbose). TDD: main_test.go with TestRootCommandHelp, TestVersionCommand, TestGlobalFlags.

title: 1.2: Create ContextDocument model types
description: Create cli/internal/model/ package. Define ContextDocument, Section interface, Category/Origin enums. Typed sections: TechStackSection, DependencySection, BuildCommandsSection, TextSection. TDD: model_test.go with interface compliance and JSON roundtrip tests.

title: 1.3: Expand Provider struct with Phase 1 methods
description: Add ContentTypes, Discovery, EmitPath, ConfigPaths to Provider struct. Expand Cursor, Windsurf, Codex providers to full content type support. Add Copilot provider. TDD: provider_test.go with content type, discovery path, and detection tests.

title: 1.4: Create .nesco/ config package
description: Create cli/internal/config/ package. Config struct with Providers, ScanOptions, EmitOptions. Load/Save/Exists/DirPath functions. Respects NESCO_CONFIG_DIR env var. TDD: config_test.go with save/load roundtrip and env var override tests.

title: 1.5: Create output switching package
description: Create cli/internal/output/ package. Writer var, JSON bool, Print() for JSON/human, PrintError() with code+message+suggestion. Respects --json, --no-color, --quiet flags. TDD: output_test.go with JSON mode, quiet mode, and error format tests.

title: Group 2: Phase 1 Provider Parity
description: Import discovery, parsers, parity analysis, Phase 1 CLI commands (init, import, parity, config, info). Depends on Group 1.
close_reason: All 6 tasks complete: init, import, parity, config, info commands implemented with tests

title: 2.1: Create parse package with discovery and classification
description: Create cli/internal/parse/ package. Discovery struct maps provider filesystem layouts for all 8 content types. Classify() determines content type from file path + frontmatter. Completeness reporting. TDD: discovery_test.go and classify_test.go.

title: 2.2: Create provider parsers
description: Parser interface: Name()/Format()/Parse(content string)(ContextDocument, error). Implement CursorParser (.mdc with YAML frontmatter), ClaudeParser (CLAUDE.md markdown), GenericParser (plain markdown). Lossy mapping warnings. TDD: parser tests per provider.

title: 2.3: Create parity analysis package
description: Create cli/internal/parity/ package. Analyze() takes detected providers + root, discovers content for each, builds coverage matrix. ParityReport with gaps, summary, and per-provider breakdown. TDD: parity_test.go with multi-provider gap detection.

title: 2.4: Add nesco init command
description: Create cli/cmd/nesco/init.go. Auto-detects providers, creates .nesco/config.json, respects --yes and --force flags. Error on existing config without --force. TDD: init_test.go with TestInitCreatesConfig, TestInitRefusesOverwrite, TestInitForceOverwrite.

title: 2.5: Add nesco import and nesco parity commands
description: import.go: --from <provider> required, --type filter, --preview mode, --json output. parity.go: needs 2+ providers, outputs coverage matrix. TDD: import_test.go and parity_test.go with flag validation and preview tests.

title: 2.6: Add nesco config and nesco info commands
description: config.go: add/remove providers, show current config. info.go: machine-readable capability manifest with --json. TDD: config_cmd_test.go and info_test.go with add/remove/duplicate/JSON tests.

title: 8: Update scan command to use SilentError
description: Wrap scan errors with SilentError after PrintError. Files: scan.go

title: Fix --json flag: output.JSON never set from CLI flag
description: main.go:40 registers --json into local jsonOutput variable, but codebase reads output.JSON (package-level bool). No PersistentPreRun bridges them. Every --json flag is silently ignored. Fix: use rootCmd.PersistentFlags().BoolVar(&output.JSON, ...) directly.
close_reason: Fixed by subagents in parallel execution

title: 1B: Wire --no-color flag to lipgloss
description: Add PersistentPreRunE, import lipgloss/termenv, call SetColorProfile(Ascii). Files: main.go
close_reason: PersistentPreRunE wired. lipgloss.SetColorProfile(Ascii) on --no-color, NO_COLOR, TERM=dumb.
